Description: Proactively notifies landlords and property managers of upcoming lease expirations and auto-drafts renewal letters.
AU-Specific Context: Integrates with state tenancy authority portals (NSW Fair Trading, VCAT, QCAT). Must respect state-minimum notice periods.
Copilot Studio Build Notes: Power Automate recurrence trigger. Topic collects property address, tenant name, lease end date. Sends Teams/email alert with draft renewal letter via Outlook connector.
Connectors / Features: Power Automate (recurrence), Outlook connector, SharePoint (lease register)
Upsell Path: Add Dataverse property register for full portfolio view → Tier 5

Description: Generates suburb-level rental market summaries from CoreLogic or Domain data for landlords.
AU-Specific Context: AU-specific: Pulls from CoreLogic, SQM Research, REIV data sources.
Copilot Studio Build Notes: Prompt Agent. Single topic with question nodes collecting suburb, property type, date range. Generative AI node synthesises market commentary. No external connectors needed if agent pastes in raw data.
Connectors / Features: Generative AI prompt node (native), optional HTTP connector to CoreLogic API
Upsell Path: Connect to CoreLogic API via custom connector → Tier 3

Description: Books and manages routine inspection schedules, sending reminders to tenants and agents via Teams or email.
AU-Specific Context: Must respect state-minimum notice periods (e.g. 24–48hr under Residential Tenancies Acts).
Copilot Studio Build Notes: Power Automate flow triggered on calendar logic. Checks SharePoint/Dataverse inspection register. Sends Outlook emails to tenant and agent with correct notice period enforced via condition nodes.
Connectors / Features: Outlook connector, SharePoint connector, Power Automate (scheduled + condition)
Upsell Path: Add tenant self-service rescheduling via Teams bot → Tier 5

Description: Triages incoming maintenance requests, categorises urgency, assigns to trades, and logs in the property management system.
AU-Specific Context: AU-specific: References standard trade categories used in Australian property management (plumber, electrician, general maintenance).
Copilot Studio Build Notes: Copilot Studio topic with entity extraction for issue type and urgency. Condition branching to assign to trades. Writes record to Dataverse or SharePoint list. Sends confirmation to tenant.
Connectors / Features: Dataverse or SharePoint connector, Teams connector, Outlook connector
Upsell Path: Add trades contractor portal integration via custom connector → Tier 5

Description: Transcribes and summarises strata committee meeting minutes, extracts action items, and distributes to owners.
AU-Specific Context: Follows Strata Schemes Management Act requirements for record keeping and distribution.
Copilot Studio Build Notes: Prompt Agent. Agent accepts uploaded meeting transcript or pasted text. Generative AI node extracts summary, decisions, and action items. Output formatted for distribution. No connectors needed.
Connectors / Features: Generative AI prompt node (native), optional SharePoint for storage
Upsell Path: Add auto-distribution via Outlook to owner list → Tier 3

Description: Calculates estimated stamp duty based on property value and buyer type (FHB, investor, concession) by state.
AU-Specific Context: AU-specific: Per-state duty rates, FHOG eligibility, pensioner concessions, off-the-plan concessions.
Copilot Studio Build Notes: Prompt Agent. Question nodes collect state, property value, buyer type, property use. Generative AI node references embedded stamp duty rate tables per state. Returns estimate with caveats.
Connectors / Features: Generative AI prompt node (native) with embedded rate tables
Upsell Path: Add real-time rate lookup via HTTP connector to state revenue office APIs → Tier 3

Description: Creates compelling property listings from agent-supplied attributes, matching agency tone of voice.
AU-Specific Context: AU-specific: Uses Australian real estate vocabulary — ensuite, alfresco, ducted reverse-cycle, lock-up garage, body corporate.
Copilot Studio Build Notes: Prompt Agent. Question nodes collect property type, suburb, beds, baths, features, tone preference, word count. Generative AI node produces listing copy. Refine loop lets agent adjust tone or length. System prompt includes AU vocabulary and ACL compliance instruction.
Connectors / Features: Generative AI prompt node (native)
Upsell Path: Connect to agency CRM (Rex, Agentbox) via custom connector to pre-populate property attributes → Tier 3

Description: Tracks conveyancing milestones, outstanding documents, and settlement dates across multiple deals in one dashboard.
AU-Specific Context: AU-specific: PEXA integration for electronic settlement, state-specific conveyancing workflows.
Copilot Studio Build Notes: Connected Agent. Power Automate flow monitors SharePoint settlement register for milestone updates. Agent answers status queries via Copilot Studio topic. Sends alerts on approaching deadlines.
Connectors / Features: SharePoint connector, Outlook connector, Power Automate (condition-based alerts)
Upsell Path: PEXA API integration via custom connector for real-time settlement status → Tier 5

Description: Reviews specialist disability accommodation (SDA) applications against NDIS quality standards.
AU-Specific Context: AU-specific: NDIS SDA rules, Enrolled Dwelling requirements, NDIS Quality and Safeguards Commission standards.
Copilot Studio Build Notes: Connected Agent. Accepts uploaded SDA application document. Generative AI node checks against embedded NDIS SDA eligibility criteria checklist. Returns compliance gap report.
Connectors / Features: SharePoint connector (document input), Generative AI prompt node with embedded SDA criteria
Upsell Path: Connect to NDIS provider portal API for live enrolment status checks → Tier 5

Description: Helps investors model negative gearing scenarios, tax deductions, and cash flow across portfolios.
AU-Specific Context: AU-specific: ATO deductibility rules, depreciation schedules, CGT discount for properties held 12+ months.
Copilot Studio Build Notes: Prompt Agent. Question nodes collect purchase price, rental income, expenses, loan details, marginal tax rate. Generative AI node models cash flow and tax position. Output includes disclaimer to seek financial advice.
Connectors / Features: Generative AI prompt node (native)
Upsell Path: Add portfolio-level modelling across multiple properties → Tier 3

Description: Drafts GP referral letters from clinical notes, ensuring correct patient and specialist details.
AU-Specific Context: AU-specific: Medicare referral requirements, MBS item numbers, correct specialist designation format.
Copilot Studio Build Notes: Prompt Agent. Question nodes collect patient name, DOB, referring GP, specialist type, clinical summary. Generative AI node drafts letter in standard AU medical referral format. GP reviews before sending.

Upsell Path: Integrate with clinical system (Best Practice, MedicalDirector) via custom connector → Tier 3

Description: Compiles participant progress notes and evidence into a structured NDIS plan review report.
AU-Specific Context: AU-specific: NDIS Act, NDIA portal structure, functional capacity evidence requirements.
Copilot Studio Build Notes: Connected Agent. Collects progress notes from SharePoint or uploaded files. Generative AI node structures evidence against NDIS goal domains. Outputs draft review report for support coordinator review.

Description: Suggests weekly rosters for aged care workers based on qualifications, availability, and award conditions.

Copilot Studio Build Notes: Orchestration Agent. Multi-step flow: queries staff availability from Dataverse, checks qualification records, applies SCHADS Award rules via logic, generates roster suggestions. Manager approves via adaptive card in Teams.
Connectors / Features: Dataverse connector, Teams connector (adaptive cards), Power Automate (complex logic), Outlook connector
Upsell Path: Full integration with rostering system (RotaMaster, Deputy) via custom connector

Description: Assists clinicians in structuring SOAP notes and discharge summaries from free-text dictation.
AU-Specific Context: No AU-specific compliance issue — SOAP format is universal, but output should reference MBS item numbers where relevant.
Copilot Studio Build Notes: Prompt Agent. Clinician pastes or dictates free-text observations. Generative AI node structures into SOAP format (Subjective, Objective, Assessment, Plan). Quick-reply options for common adjustments.
Connectors / Features: Generative AI prompt node (native)
Upsell Path: Connect to clinical system for direct note insertion → Tier 3

Description: Summarises key entries from patient My Health Record exports for clinician briefing.
AU-Specific Context: AU-specific: My Health Record Act 2012, ADHA data standards, sensitivity flags for restricted documents.
Copilot Studio Build Notes: Prompt Agent. Clinician uploads MHR export file. Generative AI node extracts and summarises medications, allergies, recent encounters, and pathology. Output structured as pre-consultation brief.

Upsell Path: API integration with My Health Record (requires NASH PKI auth) → Tier 5

Description: Guides case managers in optimal allocation of HCP funds against approved categories.

Copilot Studio Build Notes: Connected Agent. Question nodes collect HCP level, current allocations, client goals. Generative AI node recommends allocation split against approved categories. References embedded HCP price guide.

Upsell Path: Connect to HCP management system (Lumary, AlayaCare) → Tier 5

Description: Cross-checks patient medication lists across discharge and admission records for discrepancies.
AU-Specific Context: Standard across AU clinical settings — aligns with ACSQHC medication safety standards.
Copilot Studio Build Notes: Connected Agent. Accepts two uploaded medication lists (admission vs discharge). Generative AI node identifies additions, removals, and dose changes. Outputs reconciliation report flagging discrepancies for pharmacist review.
Connectors / Features: Generative AI prompt node, file handling, SharePoint for audit log
Upsell Path: Clinical system integration for automated list retrieval → Tier 5

Description: Aggregates policies, training records, and audit logs into ACQSC accreditation evidence packages.

Upsell Path: Direct ACQSC portal submission integration → future custom connector

Description: Checks that all staff have current NDIS Worker Screening checks and police clearances before roster assignment.
AU-Specific Context: AU-specific: NDIS Worker Screening Act 2020, state variations, clearance expiry periods.

Upsell Path: Integration with NDIS Worker Screening database API → Tier 5

Description: Converts brief nurse notes into structured incident reports aligned with reportable incident frameworks.
AU-Specific Context: AU-specific: SIRS (Serious Incident Response Scheme) reportable incident categories for aged care.

Upsell Path: Auto-submission to SIRS portal via Power Automate + ACQSC integration → Tier 5

Description: Walks a customer through pre-approval eligibility criteria and prepares a document checklist.
AU-Specific Context: AU-specific: APRA serviceability buffers (3% above assessment rate), HEM benchmarks, APRA ADI requirements.

Upsell Path: ATO API integration for real-time contribution data → future custom connector

Description: Guides new suppliers through document submission, bank detail collection, and onboarding approval flow.
AU-Specific Context: AU-specific: GST registration check (ABN Lookup), PPSR registration for security interests, modern slavery supply chain obligations.
Copilot Studio Build Notes: Orchestration Agent. Multi-step flow: supplier submits details via Teams/web form. Agent validates ABN via HTTP connector to ABN Lookup API. Collects insurance, bank details, compliance docs. Routes to procurement approval. Creates vendor record in ERP.
Connectors / Features: HTTP connector (ABN Lookup API), SharePoint connector, Dataverse connector, Outlook connector, Power Automate
Upsell Path: Full ERP vendor master integration (SAP, Oracle) → completion of Tier 5

Agent Name: Buy Now Pay Later Eligibility Checker
Description: Assesses customer eligibility for BNPL options using credit and spend history inputs.
AU-Specific Context: AU-specific: ASIC BNPL regulation under NCC from 2024, hardship provisions, credit assessment requirements.
Copilot Studio Build Notes: Connected Agent. Customer inputs purchase amount, income, existing BNPL commitments. Generative AI node applies ASIC-compliant assessment logic. Returns eligibility indication with responsible lending disclaimer.
Connectors / Features: Generative AI prompt node with embedded NCC criteria
Upsell Path: Credit bureau API integration for live credit check → Tier 5

Description: Builds promotional calendar drafts aligned with AU retail events.
AU-Specific Context: AU-specific: EOFY (June), Click Frenzy (November), Boxing Day, Australia Day, Easter, Back to School (Jan/Feb).
Copilot Studio Build Notes: Prompt Agent. Retailer inputs product categories, margin targets, channels, planning horizon. Generative AI node produces campaign calendar with recommended offer types, timing, and channel mix aligned to AU retail calendar.
Connectors / Features: Generative AI prompt node (native)
Upsell Path: Connect to marketing automation platform (Klaviyo, Mailchimp) for campaign activation → Tier 3

Description: Manages click-and-collect order status, notifies customers on readiness, and handles no-show follow-up.
AU-Specific Context: AU-specific: ACL obligations if goods not available within stated timeframe.
Copilot Studio Build Notes: Connected Agent. Power Automate monitors order status in SharePoint/OMS. Sends Teams or SMS notification when order ready. Follows up with no-show customers after 48hr. Cancels and refunds after 7 days per policy.
Connectors / Features: SharePoint or Dataverse connector, Outlook connector, Teams connector, Power Automate
Upsell Path: OMS integration (Shopify, Cin7) for real-time order status → Tier 5

Description: Guides applicants through Development Application requirements by council and development type.
AU-Specific Context: AU-specific: State EPA Acts (EP&A Act NSW, Planning and Environment Act VIC), council DCP requirements vary by LGA.
Copilot Studio Build Notes: Connected Agent. Applicant selects state, LGA, and development type. Agent queries SharePoint council requirements register. Generative AI node produces tailored checklist. Applicant downloads checklist as PDF.
Connectors / Features: SharePoint connector (LGA requirements data), Generative AI prompt node, Outlook/Teams for delivery
Upsell Path: Direct council ePlanning portal integration → Tier 5

Description: Manages FOI request intake, drafts acknowledgement letters, and tracks statutory response deadlines.
AU-Specific Context: AU-specific: FOI Act 1982 (Cth), state FOI Acts — 30-day response deadline, access charges, exemptions framework.
Copilot Studio Build Notes: Connected Agent. FOI request received via email or web form. Agent creates Dataverse record with received date and 30-day deadline. Drafts acknowledgement letter via Outlook. Power Automate tracks deadline and sends internal reminders.
Connectors / Features: Dataverse connector, Outlook connector, Power Automate (deadline tracking)
Upsell Path: Integration with agency records management system (TRIM/Content Manager) → Tier 5

Description: Drafts grant applications from departmental objectives and evidence supplied by program teams.
AU-Specific Context: AU-specific: Grants.gov.au format, state government funding program criteria, acquittal reporting requirements.
Copilot Studio Build Notes: Prompt Agent. Program officer inputs grant program details, organisational objectives, project description, evidence. Generative AI node drafts application sections aligned to assessment criteria. Outputs structured draft for review.
Connectors / Features: Generative AI prompt node (native)
Upsell Path: Connect to grants management system for submission → Tier 3

Description: Converts policy team notes into structured ministerial briefs following departmental templates.
AU-Specific Context: AU-specific: APS brief format conventions — BLUF structure, recommendation, background, financial implications, consultation.
Copilot Studio Build Notes: Prompt Agent. Policy officer inputs background facts, issue summary, recommendations, consultation notes. Generative AI node structures into standard ministerial brief format with BLUF opening and action required.
Connectors / Features: Generative AI prompt node with embedded departmental brief template
Upsell Path: SharePoint integration for brief register and routing → Tier 3

Description: Answers resident enquiries about rates calculations, concessions, and payment plans.
AU-Specific Context: AU-specific: Council rates methodologies differ by state (land value, capital value, site value), pensioner concession rates.
Copilot Studio Build Notes: Connected Agent. Resident asks rates query via council website or Teams. Agent queries SharePoint rates FAQ knowledge base and resident record in Dataverse. Generative AI node personalises response. Escalates complex queries to staff.
Connectors / Features: SharePoint connector (FAQ/knowledge base), Dataverse connector, Generative AI prompt node
Upsell Path: Integration with council rating system (Pathway, Authority) → Tier 5

Description: Reviews procurement documentation against Commonwealth Procurement Rules or state equivalents.
AU-Specific Context: AU-specific: CPRs (Cth), Victorian Procurement Policy, NSW Procurement Policy Framework, value-for-money assessment.
Copilot Studio Build Notes: Connected Agent. Procurement officer uploads documentation. Generative AI node reviews against embedded CPR/state policy checklist. Flags missing elements (market testing evidence, probity plan, value-for-money assessment). Outputs compliance gap report.
Connectors / Features: Generative AI prompt node with embedded policy framework, SharePoint for document storage
Upsell Path: AusTender integration for panel arrangement checking → Tier 5

Description: Guides staff through structured WHS incident report completion and routes to safety officer.
AU-Specific Context: AU-specific: WHS Act 2011 (harmonised), state variations (VIC OHS Act), notifiable incident obligations to regulator.
Copilot Studio Build Notes: Connected Agent. Staff initiates incident report via Teams or web. Question nodes collect incident type, location, people involved, immediate actions. Power Automate checks if notifiable under WHS Act. Routes to safety officer and creates Dataverse record.
Connectors / Features: Dataverse connector, Teams connector, Power Automate (notifiable incident logic), Outlook connector
Upsell Path: SafeWork/WorkSafe portal integration for notifiable incident lodgement → Tier 5

Description: Categorises and summarises community submissions for policy or planning consultations.
AU-Specific Context: AU-specific: Public consultation requirements under planning legislation, sentiment analysis for community reports.
Copilot Studio Build Notes: Orchestration Agent. Submissions collected via SharePoint form or email. Power Automate batches submissions. Generative AI node categorises by theme, sentiment, and key issue. Produces summary report with thematic breakdown and representative quotes.
Connectors / Features: SharePoint connector, Outlook connector, Power Automate (batch processing), Generative AI prompt node
Upsell Path: Engagement platform integration (Engagement HQ/Bang the Table) → Tier 5

Description: Drafts AEC-compliant authorisation notices and communication templates for council election comms.
AU-Specific Context: AU-specific: AEC authorisation requirements, Electoral Act obligations for political communication.
Copilot Studio Build Notes: Prompt Agent. Communications officer inputs message type, candidate/organisation details, communication channel. Generative AI node produces draft with correct authorisation line format per AEC guidelines.
Connectors / Features: Generative AI prompt node with embedded AEC authorisation requirements
Upsell Path: None — intentionally kept as Prompt Agent to avoid automation of electoral comms

Description: Checks uploaded contractor insurance, licence, and safety documentation against council requirements.
AU-Specific Context: AU-specific: State contractor licensing requirements, public liability minimums, SWMS requirements for council sites.
Copilot Studio Build Notes: Connected Agent. Contractor uploads documents via SharePoint portal. Generative AI node checks completeness against council requirements list. Flags expiry dates and missing documents. Sends compliance status to procurement and contractor.
Connectors / Features: SharePoint connector, Generative AI prompt node, Outlook connector, Power Automate (expiry monitoring)
Upsell Path: Integration with contractor management platform (Avetta, Cm3) → Tier 5

Description: Collects insurances, licences, and bank details from subcontractors and routes for approval.
AU-Specific Context: AU-specific: State contractor licensing (QBCC, NSW Fair Trading, VBA), SWMS requirements, public liability minimums.
Copilot Studio Build Notes: Orchestration Agent. Multi-step flow: subcontractor completes Teams/web form. Agent validates licence numbers via HTTP connector to state licensing authority API. Collects insurance certificates, bank details, SWMS templates. Routes for project manager approval. Creates vendor record.
Connectors / Features: HTTP connector (state licensing APIs), SharePoint connector, Outlook connector, Power Automate, Dataverse
Upsell Path: Full integration with project management system (Procore, Aconex) → completion of Tier 5

Description: Generates Safe Work Method Statements for common trades tasks based on site and task inputs.
AU-Specific Context: AU-specific: WHS Regulations — high-risk construction work categories, SWMS must be site and task specific.
Copilot Studio Build Notes: Prompt Agent. Site supervisor inputs task type, site conditions, tools/plant, personnel. Generative AI node generates SWMS with hazard identification, risk assessment, and control measures per WHS Regulations. Includes high-risk construction work check.
Connectors / Features: Generative AI prompt node with embedded WHS high-risk construction criteria
Upsell Path: Integration with site safety management platform (SafeSite, Safety Champion) → Tier 3

Description: Drafts project variation notices from site supervisor notes for approval and cost tracking.
AU-Specific Context: AU-specific: Security of Payment Act variation claim requirements — must be in writing, reference contract, include time and cost impact.
Copilot Studio Build Notes: Prompt Agent. Site supervisor inputs variation description, reason (scope change, site condition, instruction), time impact, cost estimate. Generative AI node drafts formal variation notice compliant with SoP Act requirements.
Connectors / Features: Generative AI prompt node with embedded SoP Act variation requirements
Upsell Path: Connect to project management system (Procore) for variation register tracking → Tier 3

Description: Reviews subcontractor progress claims against schedule of rates and generates payment recommendation reports.
AU-Specific Context: AU-specific: Security of Payment Act — 10 business day response deadline for payment schedule, reference date obligations.
Copilot Studio Build Notes: Connected Agent. Subcontractor submits progress claim via SharePoint or email. Agent extracts claim amounts. Compares against contract schedule of rates in Dataverse. Generative AI node flags discrepancies. Produces payment recommendation within SoP Act deadline.
Connectors / Features: SharePoint connector, Dataverse connector (contract data), Generative AI prompt node, Outlook connector
Upsell Path: Integration with project cost management system (Cheops, Jobpac) → Tier 5

Description: Logs, categorises, and assigns defects from site inspections, tracking rectification status to closure.
AU-Specific Context: AU-specific: Defects liability period obligations under AS 4000/4300 construction contracts.
Copilot Studio Build Notes: Connected Agent. Inspector submits defect via Teams with photo and description. Agent creates Dataverse record with defect category, assigned trade, due date. Sends notification to trade via Outlook. Tracks status to closure. Generates defects report for superintendent.
Connectors / Features: Dataverse connector, Teams connector, Outlook connector, Power Automate (status tracking)
Upsell Path: Integration with field inspection app (Procore, Snag-It) → Tier 5

Description: Reviews project specifications against NCC/BCA requirements and flags potential non-compliance.
AU-Specific Context: AU-specific: NCC 2022 (BCA), state building regulations, deemed-to-satisfy provisions vs performance solutions.
Copilot Studio Build Notes: Connected Agent. Designer uploads specification section or pastes spec text. Generative AI node checks against embedded NCC 2022 deemed-to-satisfy provisions. Flags potential non-compliance and suggests relevant NCC clauses.
Connectors / Features: Generative AI prompt node with embedded NCC 2022 key provisions, SharePoint for document storage
Upsell Path: ABCB API integration for live NCC updates → future

Description: Drafts structured responses to Requests for Information from project documentation.
AU-Specific Context: AU-specific: AS 4000 contract RFI obligations, timeframes for superintendent response.
Copilot Studio Build Notes: Prompt Agent. Project engineer inputs RFI question, contract clause reference, relevant drawings/specs. Generative AI node drafts clear, technically accurate response. Project manager reviews before issuing.
Connectors / Features: Generative AI prompt node (native)
Upsell Path: Integration with document control system (Aconex, Procore) for RFI register → Tier 3

Description: Aggregates worker timesheets across projects and generates payroll-ready summaries.
AU-Specific Context: AU-specific: Construction Award rostered days off, overtime rates, allowances (tool, travel, site). PAYG withholding obligations.
Copilot Studio Build Notes: Connected Agent. Workers submit timesheets via Microsoft Forms or Teams. Power Automate aggregates by employee across projects. Applies Construction Award rules for overtime and allowances. Generates payroll-ready summary for payroll team.
Connectors / Features: Microsoft Forms connector, Power Automate (award interpretation logic), SharePoint, Outlook connector
Upsell Path: Integration with payroll system (KeyPay, Xero Payroll) for direct payroll creation → Tier 5

Description: Compiles warranties, manuals, and as-built documentation into a structured client handover package.
AU-Specific Context: AU-specific: Statutory warranty obligations under state building legislation (Home Building Act NSW, DBC Act QLD).
Copilot Studio Build Notes: Connected Agent. Project administrator collects documents from SharePoint project library. Generative AI node generates index and executive summary. Power Automate assembles into structured package. Sends to client via Outlook.
Connectors / Features: SharePoint connector, Generative AI prompt node, Outlook connector, Power Automate (document assembly)
Upsell Path: Integration with BIM/document management platform (Autodesk ACC) → Tier 5

Description: Assists estimators and project managers in drafting tender response sections from templates and past bids.
AU-Specific Context: AU-specific: Government prequalification schemes (NSW PQC, QLD QBuild, VIC DTF), compliance schedules.
Copilot Studio Build Notes: Prompt Agent. Estimator inputs project description, client, key requirements, relevant past project examples. Generative AI node drafts methodology, company profile, and relevant experience sections. Searches SharePoint past bid library for precedent content.
Connectors / Features: Generative AI prompt node, optional SharePoint connector (past bid library)
Upsell Path: Full tender management system integration → Tier 3

Description: Generates crop-specific spray schedules based on growth stage, weather inputs, and chemical permit data.
AU-Specific Context: AU-specific: APVMA chemical registration, label withholding periods, off-label use restrictions.
Copilot Studio Build Notes: Connected Agent. Agronomist inputs crop type, growth stage, target pests/diseases, weather forecast. HTTP connector retrieves BOM weather data. Generative AI node cross-references against APVMA-registered chemicals and generates spray schedule with WHP compliance notes.
Connectors / Features: HTTP connector (BOM API, APVMA API), Generative AI prompt node
Upsell Path: Integration with precision agriculture platform (AgWorld, Agronomy App) → Tier 5

Description: Logs and reports livestock movements via NLIS for compliance with biosecurity traceability requirements.
AU-Specific Context: AU-specific: NLIS (National Livestock Identification System), LPA NVD (National Vendor Declaration) requirements.
Copilot Studio Build Notes: Connected Agent. Farm manager inputs movement details (property PIC, species, head count, date, destination). Power Automate records to Dataverse. HTTP connector submits movement record to NLIS database API. Sends confirmation to operator.
Connectors / Features: HTTP connector (NLIS database API), Dataverse connector, Outlook connector
Upsell Path: Full integration with on-farm ERP (AgriDigital, Figured) → Tier 5

Description: Structures farm business plans from operator-supplied financials and production data.
AU-Specific Context: AU-specific: Rural Finance business plan format, Agribusiness Australia templates, ABARES benchmarking context.
Copilot Studio Build Notes: Prompt Agent. Farm operator inputs enterprise mix, production data, cost of production, debt levels, goals. Generative AI node structures into standard farm business plan format with executive summary, financial analysis, and strategic objectives.
Connectors / Features: Generative AI prompt node (native)
Upsell Path: Connect to farm accounting platform (Figured, AgriWebb) for live financial data → Tier 3

Description: Monitors irrigation water usage against licence allocations and notifies when thresholds are approached.
AU-Specific Context: AU-specific: State water licence registers — Murray-Darling Basin Authority, NSW NRAR, VIC DELWP, QLD DNRME.
Copilot Studio Build Notes: Connected Agent. Farm manager logs water usage events to Dataverse. Power Automate calculates running total against licence allocation (stored in Dataverse). Sends Teams/Outlook alert at 75% and 90% thresholds.
Connectors / Features: Dataverse connector, Teams connector, Outlook connector, Power Automate (running totals)
Upsell Path: State water registry API integration for automated usage submission → Tier 5

Description: Matches farm operator profiles to eligible federal and state agri grants and programs.
AU-Specific Context: AU-specific: DAFF programs (RFCS, FMC, drought support), state agri grants, emergency relief programs.
Copilot Studio Build Notes: Prompt Agent. Operator inputs enterprise type, state, financial situation, goals. Generative AI node cross-references against embedded database of current DAFF and state agri grant programs. Returns matched grants with eligibility criteria and application links.
Connectors / Features: Generative AI prompt node with embedded grant database
Upsell Path: Grants.gov.au API integration for live grant listings → Tier 3

Description: Guides farm managers through structured biosecurity incident reporting to state authorities.
AU-Specific Context: AU-specific: Biosecurity Act 2015 (Cth), Emergency Animal Disease reporting (AUSVETPLAN), Emergency Plant Pest reporting.
Copilot Studio Build Notes: Connected Agent. Farm manager reports suspected incident via Teams. Question nodes collect species/crop affected, symptoms, date observed, location. Generative AI node assesses if EAD/EPP notifiable. Routes to correct state authority contact and creates structured report.
Connectors / Features: Teams connector, Dataverse connector (incident log), Generative AI prompt node, Outlook connector
Upsell Path: Direct state biosecurity authority reporting portal integration → Tier 5

Description: Assesses farm practices against ACCUs eligibility criteria and estimates potential carbon income.
AU-Specific Context: AU-specific: ACCU scheme, Clean Energy Regulator approved methods (soil carbon, avoided deforestation, savanna burning).
Copilot Studio Build Notes: Connected Agent. Farm operator inputs property size, land use, current practices, vegetation type. Generative AI node assesses eligibility against embedded CER method criteria. Estimates potential ACCUs per annum and indicative income at current carbon price.
Connectors / Features: Generative AI prompt node with embedded CER method criteria, HTTP connector (carbon price feed)
Upsell Path: Clean Energy Regulator API integration for project registration → Tier 5

Description: Models harvest cost per tonne based on fuel prices, machinery hours, contractor rates, and yield estimates.
AU-Specific Context: AU-specific: GRDC benchmarks for broadacre crops, Australian fuel price inputs, typical contractor rates by region.
Copilot Studio Build Notes: Prompt Agent. Operator inputs crop type, area, yield estimate, machinery hours, fuel cost, contractor rates. Generative AI node calculates cost per tonne and compares to GRDC benchmark ranges. Returns breakdown with sensitivity analysis.
Connectors / Features: Generative AI prompt node (native)
Upsell Path: Connect to AgriWebb or farm ERP for automated cost data input → Tier 3

Description: Compiles phytosanitary certificates, country-specific declaration forms, and customs documents for ag exports.
AU-Specific Context: AU-specific: DAFF export permits, country market access requirements, AQIS inspection requirements.
Copilot Studio Build Notes: Connected Agent. Exporter inputs commodity, destination country, consignment details. Generative AI node retrieves embedded country market access requirements. Generates pre-filled phytosanitary certificate and customs declaration templates. Routes to DAFF for official certification.
Connectors / Features: Generative AI prompt node with embedded country market access data, SharePoint connector, Outlook connector
Upsell Path: DAFF EXDOC integration for automated phytosanitary certificate issuance → Tier 5

Description: Summarises Bureau of Meteorology seasonal outlooks and maps risk to planting or harvest decisions.
AU-Specific Context: AU-specific: BOM seasonal climate outlooks, ENSO and IOD indicators, ABARES crop outlook reports.
Copilot Studio Build Notes: Prompt Agent (upgradeable). Farm manager inputs location and decision type (planting, harvest, chemical application). HTTP connector retrieves current BOM seasonal outlook. Generative AI node interprets outlook in context of decision and produces risk briefing.
Connectors / Features: HTTP connector (BOM API), Generative AI prompt node
Upsell Path: Precision agriculture platform integration for field-level risk mapping → Tier 3

Description: Creates role-specific job descriptions aligned to the organisation's JDF template and ANZSCO codes.
AU-Specific Context: AU-specific: ANZSCO occupation codes for reporting, Fair Work classification level alignment, EEO statement requirements.
Copilot Studio Build Notes: Prompt Agent. HR officer inputs role title, key responsibilities, qualifications, team structure. Generative AI node produces JD with ANZSCO code, classification level, EEO statement, and AU employment conditions summary.
Connectors / Features: Generative AI prompt node with embedded ANZSCO code lookup
Upsell Path: Connect to HRIS (Workday, SAP SuccessFactors) for role master data → Tier 3

Description: Personalises new starter onboarding tasks by role, department, and location and tracks completion.
AU-Specific Context: AU-specific: Fair Work Information Statement, Superannuation choice form (ATO TFN declaration), right to work check.
Copilot Studio Build Notes: Connected Agent. New starter record created in Dataverse. Agent generates personalised checklist including AU statutory items (Fair Work Info Statement, super choice, TFN). Tasks assigned via Teams. Completion tracked in Dataverse.
Connectors / Features: Dataverse connector, Teams connector, Outlook connector, Power Automate (task assignment + tracking)
Upsell Path: HRIS integration (Workday, SAP) for automated new starter record creation → Tier 5

Description: Identifies the applicable Modern Award and pay classification for a described role and employment type.
AU-Specific Context: AU-specific: Fair Work Modern Award system (122 awards), BOOT test for EAs, minimum pay rates.
Copilot Studio Build Notes: Connected Agent. HR officer inputs role description, industry, tasks, qualifications, employment type. Generative AI node identifies likely Modern Award(s) and classification level from embedded Award hierarchy. Returns classification with confidence level and recommendation to verify with IR specialist.
Connectors / Features: Generative AI prompt node with embedded Modern Award framework
Upsell Path: Fair Work Commission API integration for live Award and rate updates → Tier 5

Description: Monitors excessive leave accruals and notifies line managers when thresholds are triggered.
AU-Specific Context: AU-specific: Fair Work Act leave entitlements, NES — annual leave accrues continuously. EBA clauses may cap accruals. Large accruals are a balance sheet liability.
Copilot Studio Build Notes: Connected Agent. Power Automate scheduled flow (weekly) queries HRIS/Dataverse for leave balances. Compares against configurable thresholds (amber: 4–6 weeks, red: 6–8 weeks, critical: 8+). Sends tiered Teams adaptive card to line manager. Logs all alerts to Dataverse audit table.
Connectors / Features: Dataverse or HRIS connector (SAP, Workday, SharePoint), Teams connector (adaptive cards), Outlook connector, Power Automate (recurrence + tiered logic)
Upsell Path: Add Power BI leave liability dashboard fed from same Dataverse table → extends value without extra build

Description: Generates structured behavioural interview questions aligned to role competencies and values.
AU-Specific Context: AU-specific: Anti-discrimination legislation (Age Discrimination Act, Sex Discrimination Act) — questions must avoid protected attributes.
Copilot Studio Build Notes: Prompt Agent. Hiring manager inputs role, key competencies (3–5), organisational values. Generative AI node generates STAR-format behavioural questions. System prompt includes AU anti-discrimination safeguards to exclude prohibited question types.
Connectors / Features: Generative AI prompt node with embedded AU anti-discrimination criteria
Upsell Path: Connect to ATS (Greenhouse, Lever, PageUp AU) for question bank injection → Tier 3

Description: Synthesises 360 feedback, self-assessment, and manager notes into a balanced performance review draft.
AU-Specific Context: AU-specific: Privacy Act obligations for employee performance data, EEO Commission guidelines on performance management.
Copilot Studio Build Notes: Prompt Agent. HR inputs self-assessment, manager comments, peer feedback. Generative AI node synthesises balanced summary highlighting strengths, development areas, and ratings rationale. Output reviewed by manager before discussion.
Connectors / Features: Generative AI prompt node (native)
Upsell Path: Connect to performance management platform (Lattice, Culture Amp) → Tier 3

Description: Produces monthly headcount, turnover, and attrition reports from HRIS data.
AU-Specific Context: AU-specific: WGEA reporting obligations for employers with 100+ employees (gender pay gap, flexible working).
Copilot Studio Build Notes: Connected Agent. Power Automate scheduled flow queries HRIS/Dataverse for headcount, new starters, leavers. Calculates turnover rate, tenure distribution, gender split. Generative AI node writes narrative commentary. Output to SharePoint report or Teams channel.
Connectors / Features: Dataverse or HRIS connector, Power Automate (calculations), Generative AI prompt node, SharePoint connector
Upsell Path: WGEA reporting portal integration for direct data submission → Tier 5

Description: Answers employee queries about their enterprise agreement entitlements in plain language.
AU-Specific Context: AU-specific: Fair Work EA provisions, interaction with NES, better off overall test (BOOT) context.
Copilot Studio Build Notes: Prompt Agent. Employee asks question about their EA. Agent searches SharePoint EA knowledge base. Generative AI node provides plain-language explanation of the relevant clause with NES interaction noted. Escalates ambiguous queries to HR.
Connectors / Features: Generative AI prompt node, SharePoint connector (EA document as knowledge source)
Upsell Path: Add query tracking to identify most common questions for HR FAQ development → Tier 3

Description: Calculates statutory redundancy pay, notice periods, and leave entitlements based on service and award.
AU-Specific Context: AU-specific: Fair Work Act redundancy provisions, small business exemption (<15 employees), genuine redundancy requirements.
Copilot Studio Build Notes: Prompt Agent. HR inputs employee service start date, classification, current salary, accrued leave, employment type. Generative AI node calculates redundancy pay (FWA scale), notice period, annual and long service leave payout. Returns itemised entitlement summary with disclaimer.
Connectors / Features: Generative AI prompt node with embedded FWA redundancy scale
Upsell Path: Connect to HRIS for automated entitlement calculation at point of termination → Tier 3

Description: Guides managers through identifying and documenting psychosocial hazards in their team.
AU-Specific Context: AU-specific: WHS Regulations 2023 psychosocial risk duties, Safe Work Australia Code of Practice on psychosocial hazards.
Copilot Studio Build Notes: Connected Agent. Manager initiates via Teams. Question nodes walk through Safe Work Australia psychosocial hazard categories (job demands, low control, poor support, etc.). Generative AI node assesses risk level. Creates Dataverse hazard register entry with recommended controls.
Connectors / Features: Teams connector, Dataverse connector, Generative AI prompt node, Outlook connector (routes high-risk items to WHS officer)
Upsell Path: Integration with WHS management system (Vault, Intelex) → Tier 5
